display.purpose: Hero attribute clusters and chapter titles. Cormorant SC at small-cap height, weight 600–700, tracked tightly (0.06em).

label.purpose: Default uppercase label voice on cards and forms. Cormorant SC, weight 600, tracked 0.2em.

body.purpose: All running prose, inputs, and numerics. Crimson Pro at weight 500 default, 600 for numerics and emphasis. Italic carries player-entered fields.

eyebrow.purpose: Primary eyebrows above sections, top-nav links, primary buttons. 13px Cormorant SC tracked 0.28em — the manuscript tell.

microlabel.purpose: Diamond labels, card actions, in-component labels. 12px tracked 0.2em.

microcaption.purpose: Sheet field labels, table headers, kbd keycaps. 11px tracked 0.2em.

microline.purpose: Attribute pills, dice face captions. 10px is the absolute floor.

shadows.name: shadow-card
shadows.purpose: Library hero card at rest. The hairline ink-red sits flush under the card; the navy spread is the page-glow.

shadows.name: shadow-card-hover
shadows.purpose: Library card on hover; pair with -translate-y-0.5. The card lifts and the rubric thickens.

shadows.name: shadow-sheet
shadows.purpose: The printed character sheet on screen. A single soft halo, no rubric line — the sheet is paper.

shadows.name: shadow-modal
shadows.purpose: Dialogs and modals — the only surface that owes the page weight above it.

shadows.name: shadow-launcher
shadows.purpose: The floating dice launcher. Lifted but compact.

motion.name: transition-default
motion.purpose: Default for hover colour and border swaps. Restrained outside the dice tray.

motion.name: card-lift
motion.purpose: Library card hover: -translate-y-0.5 + shadow swap from card to card-hover.

motion.name: reduced-motion-cap
motion.purpose: Universal cap when prefers-reduced-motion is reduce. Each feature can layer richer behaviour on top (the dice stage disables physics via usePrefersReducedMotion).

diamondGeometry.purpose: Visual gap between two 45deg-rotated diamonds = CSS gap minus (size · (√2 − 1) / 2). The vertex tokens express the visual gap directly.

vertexGaps.name: vertex-tight
vertexGaps.purpose: Labels right next to a diamond.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Engraved label set into an ink-red panel. Square corners, generous tracking, the rubric voice.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { font-family: 'Cormorant SC', 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.8125rem; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--color-parchment-soft, #faf4e6); background: var(--color-ink-red, #a33024); padding: 10px 16px; border: none; border-radius: 0; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: var(--color-ink-red-soft, #c9685a); } .ds-btn-primary:active { background: rgba(163, 48, 36, 0.9); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--color-parchment-soft, #faf4e6), 0 0 0 4px var(--color-ink-red, #a33024); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Transparent panel with a thin ink-red stroke. The secondary voice — declines without arguing.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { font-family: 'Cormorant SC', 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.8125rem; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--color-ink-red, #a33024); background: transparent; padding: 10px 16px; border: 1px solid rgba(163, 48, 36, 0.6); border-radius: 0; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: rgba(163, 48, 36, 0.1); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--color-parchment-soft, #faf4e6), 0 0 0 4px var(--color-ink-red, #a33024); }

components.name: Selection Card
components.description: Wizard's pick-one affordance — culture, calling, attribute set. Active state thickens the rubric border.
components.css: .ds-selection-card { display: block; width: 100%; text-align: left; padding: 16px; background: rgba(250, 244, 230, 0.4); color: var(--color-ink-navy, #1f2c5c); border: 2px solid rgba(163, 48, 36, 0.4); border-radius: 0; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 150ms ease-out, background 150ms ease-out; } .ds-selection-card:hover { border-color: rgba(163, 48, 36, 0.7); } .ds-selection-card--active { background: var(--color-parchment-soft, #faf4e6); border-color: var(--color-ink-red, #a33024); } .ds-selection-card__eyebrow { font-family: 'Cormorant SC', serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.75rem; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; color: rgba(163, 48, 36, 0.85); } .ds-selection-card__title { margin-top: 4px; font-family: 'Crimson Pro', serif; font-weight: 600; font-style: italic; font-size: 1.5rem; color: var(--color-ink-navy, #1f2c5c); } .ds-selection-card__body { margin-top: 8px; font-family: 'Crimson Pro', serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; line-height: 1.5; color: var(--color-ink-navy, #1f2c5c); } .ds-selection-card:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--color-parchment, #f5efe0), 0 0 0 4px var(--color-ink-red, #a33024); }

components.name: Character Card
components.description: Library hero card. Double-stroke frame, italic name, three diamond pills, current/max ratios, four action lozenges.
components.html:
BARDINGS · SLAYER

Aelfwyn the Bold

STR5
HRT4
WTS3
ENDURANCE22/30HOPE8/12
components.css: .ds-character-card { background: var(--color-parchment-soft, #faf4e6); border: 2px solid rgba(163, 48, 36, 0.5); border-radius: 0; box-shadow: 0 1px 0 rgba(163, 48, 36, 0.15), 0 8px 24px -12px rgba(31, 44, 92, 0.25); transition: transform 200ms ease-out, box-shadow 200ms ease-out, border-color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-character-card:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 2px 0 rgba(163, 48, 36, 0.2), 0 12px 32px -12px rgba(31, 44, 92, 0.35); border-color: var(--color-ink-red, #a33024); } .ds-character-card__inner { border: 1px solid rgba(163, 48, 36, 0.4); margin: 6px; } .ds-character-card__head { padding: 20px 20px 16px; } .ds-character-card__eyebrow { font-family: 'Cormorant SC', serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.75rem; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; color: rgba(163, 48, 36, 0.8); } .ds-character-card__sep { margin: 0 8px; color: rgba(163, 48, 36, 0.4); } .ds-character-card__name { margin: 4px 0 0; font-family: 'Crimson Pro', serif; font-style: italic; font-weight: 600; font-size: 1.875rem; line-height: 1.1; color: var(--color-ink-navy, #1f2c5c); } .ds-character-card__attrs { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 8px; margin: 16px 0 0; } .ds-attr-pill { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 4px; } .ds-attr-pill__label { font-family: 'Cormorant SC', serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.625rem; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; color: rgba(163, 48, 36, 0.75); } .ds-attr-pill__diamond { position: relative; width: 40px; height: 40px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; } .ds-attr-pill__diamond-mark { position: absolute; inset: 0; transform: rotate(45deg); border: 1px solid rgba(163, 48, 36, 0.6); } .ds-attr-pill__value { position: relative; font-family: 'Crimson Pro', serif; font-weight: 600; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; font-size: 1.25rem; color: var(--color-ink-navy, #1f2c5c); } .ds-character-card__ratios { display: flex; align-items: baseline; justify-content: space-between; gap: 8px; margin-top: 16px; font-size: 0.875rem; } .ds-character-card__ratio-label { font-family: 'Cormorant SC', serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.75rem; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; color: rgba(163, 48, 36, 0.8); } .ds-character-card__ratio-label--right { margin-left: 12px; } .ds-character-card__ratio-value { font-family: 'Crimson Pro', serif; font-weight: 600; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; font-size: 1rem; color: var(--color-ink-navy, #1f2c5c); } .ds-character-card__ratio-sep { margin: 0 4px; color: rgba(31, 44, 92, 0.4); } .ds-character-card__actions { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); border-top: 1px solid rgba(163, 48, 36, 0.3); margin-top: 4px; } .ds-character-card__action { padding: 12px 8px; font-family: 'Cormorant SC', serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.75rem; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; color: rgba(163, 48, 36, 0.85); background: transparent; border: 0; border-right: 1px solid rgba(163, 48, 36, 0.2); cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease-out, color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-character-card__action:last-child { border-right: 0; } .ds-character-card__action:hover { background: rgba(163, 48, 36, 0.1); color: var(--color-ink-red, #a33024); } .ds-character-card__action:focus-visible { outline: none; background: var(--color-ink-red, #a33024); color: var(--color-parchment-soft, #faf4e6); }

components.name: Modal
components.description: Dialog with the manuscript's double-stroke frame, an ink-red small-caps title, and Crimson Pro body description.
components.html:
EXCLUIR HERÓI

This will permanently remove Aelfwyn the Bold from your library. The action cannot be undone.
components.css: .ds-modal-backdrop { position: fixed; inset: 0; z-index: 50; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 24px 16px; background: rgba(31, 44, 92, 0.4); } .ds-modal { width: 100%; max-width: 32rem; background: var(--color-parchment-soft, #faf4e6); border: 2px solid rgba(163, 48, 36, 0.6); border-radius: 0; box-shadow: 0 8px 40px -12px rgba(31, 44, 92, 0.55); } .ds-modal__inner { border: 1px solid rgba(163, 48, 36, 0.4); margin: 6px; padding: 20px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 16px; } .ds-modal__header { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; } .ds-modal__title { margin: 0; font-family: 'Cormorant SC', serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 1.25rem; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--color-ink-red, #a33024); } .ds-modal__description { margin: 0; font-family: 'Crimson Pro', serif; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.5; color: rgba(31, 44, 92, 0.8); } .ds-modal__footer { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: flex-end; gap: 8px; padding-top: 8px; }

components.name: Diamond (signature primitive)
components.description: The system's signature mark — a rotated square holding an upright value. Used for attribute TNs, the brand mark, and the theme toggle.
components.css: .ds-diamond { position: relative; display: inline-block; vertical-align: middle; } .ds-diamond--xs { width: 28px; height: 28px; } .ds-diamond--sm { width: 40px; height: 40px; } .ds-diamond--md { width: 60px; height: 60px; } .ds-diamond--lg { width: 104px; height: 104px; } .ds-diamond__mark { position: absolute; inset: 0; transform: rotate(45deg); border: 2px solid var(--color-ink-red, #a33024); } .ds-diamond--filled .ds-diamond__mark { background: var(--color-ink-red, #a33024); } .ds-diamond__value-wrap { position: absolute; inset: 0; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; } .ds-diamond__value { font-family: 'Crimson Pro', serif; font-weight: 600; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; color: var(--color-ink-navy, #1f2c5c); line-height: 1; } .ds-diamond--xs .ds-diamond__value { font-size: 0.875rem; } .ds-diamond--sm .ds-diamond__value { font-size: 1rem; } .ds-diamond--md .ds-diamond__value { font-size: 1.5rem; } .ds-diamond--lg .ds-diamond__value { font-size: clamp(2.25rem, 4vw, 2.75rem); }

components.name: Top Nav (leather strap)
components.description: A 56px shell-coloured band that holds the manuscript closed. Diamond brand mark, eyebrow links, ink-red CTA, theme-toggle diamond.
components.html:
THE ONE SHEET
HEROESSHEET
SETTINGS
components.css: .ds-topnav { position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 40; background: var(--color-shell, #1a1410); color: var(--color-parchment-soft, #faf4e6); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(163, 48, 36, 0.4); } .ds-topnav__inner { max-width: 1600px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 24px; height: 56px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 24px; } .ds-topnav__brand { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; text-decoration: none; color: inherit; } .ds-topnav__mark { position: relative; display: inline-block; width: 24px; height: 24px; } .ds-topnav__mark-outer { position: absolute; inset: 0; transform: rotate(45deg); border: 2px solid var(--color-ink-red, #a33024); background: var(--color-shell, #1a1410); } .ds-topnav__mark-inner { position: absolute; inset: 6px; transform: rotate(45deg); background: var(--color-ink-red, #a33024); } .ds-topnav__title { font-family: 'Cormorant SC', serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 1rem; letter-spacing: 0.28em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--color-parchment-soft, #faf4e6); transition: color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-topnav__brand:hover .ds-topnav__title { color: var(--color-ink-red-soft, #c9685a); } .ds-topnav__nav { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; margin-left: 8px; } .ds-topnav__link { position: relative; padding: 10px 12px; font-family: 'Cormorant SC', serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.8125rem; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; color: rgba(250, 244, 230, 0.7); text-decoration: none; transition: color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-topnav__link:hover { color: var(--color-parchment-soft, #faf4e6); } .ds-topnav__link--active { color: var(--color-parchment-soft, #faf4e6); } .ds-topnav__underline { position: absolute; left: 12px; right: 12px; bottom: -1px; height: 2px; background: var(--color-ink-red, #a33024); } .ds-topnav__actions { margin-left: auto; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; }

narrative.overview:
The One Sheet is not a SaaS app pretending to be a TTRPG tool; it is a manuscript that the player tends on behalf of a hero. The interface should feel hand-set rather than rendered: warm cream paper, ink-navy body text, an ink-red rubricator's accent used sparingly, and uppercase small-caps labels stretched across generous letter-spacing the way a typesetter would space a chapter heading. The 3D dice tray is the only place where the app permits theatre; everywhere else, the design steps back so the type, the numbers, and the hero do the talking.

The aesthetic deliberately rejects the marketing chrome of contemporary product UI — gradients, glassmorphism, stripe-style dashboards, neon CTAs — and equally rejects fantasy cosplay: dragon-scale borders, faux-medieval drop caps, parchment textures used as wallpaper. The printed sheet, modelled on the official Free League TOR 2e character sheet, is the canonical visual spec; when the editor and the printed view drift, the editor is wrong.
keyCharacteristics: Manuscript-on-parchment temperament: warm cream surfaces, ink-navy text, a single rubricator's red.
Type does the work: hierarchy from family, weight, size, tracking, italic, and case — never gradients or icons.
Italic is reserved for player-entered fields, so the hero's own words read as a manuscript entry.
Two coexisting themes via :root[data-theme] (parchment, tor-dark) with stable token names; print always forces parchment.
Diamonds are the system's signature primitive — rotated squares carry attribute values, brand mark, and microcaptions.
Five named shadow tokens; all other elevation is forbidden.
Motion is restrained outside the dice tray and bows out under prefers-reduced-motion.

rules.name: The Rubricator's Rule
rules.body: Ink-red is the only chromatic accent in the parchment theme, and it must remain rare. Never apply it to broad surfaces, gradients, or decorative fills; reserve it for the load-bearing words on a page — primary action, active nav, accent borders, focus rings, and the rare illuminated initial. If the eye finds red dominating a screen, the screen is wrong.

rules.name: The Stable-Token Rule
rules.body: Token names do not branch on theme. Components reference --color-ink-navy regardless of whether the active palette renders it as #1f2c5c or warm parchment. Never write data-theme === 'tor-dark' ? … : … in component code.

rules.name: The Print-Wins Rule
rules.body: The print stylesheet always forces the parchment palette. Any token swap that would change the printed sheet's appearance is rejected by definition.

rules.name: The Italic-Equals-Hand Rule
rules.body: Italic is reserved for player-entered content — name, blessing, distinctive features, rewards, virtues, gear, weapon and armour names. Pair with placeholder:not-italic so empty inputs render their hint upright. Never italicise system labels, headings, or static content; the italic is what makes a player's words read like manuscript ink.

rules.name: The Ten-Pixel Floor Rule
rules.body: Sub-12px text only via the four tokens (text-eyebrow 13px, text-microlabel 12px, text-microcaption 11px, text-microline 10px). Below 10 px is forbidden. Cormorant SC reads thin under 10 px regardless of weight; if a label needs to fit smaller, the layout is wrong, not the type.

rules.name: The Tracked-Uppercase Rule
rules.body: Uppercase labels are always tracked through one of the four tracking-* tokens (display 0.06em, section 0.12em, label 0.2em, eyebrow 0.28em). Ad-hoc tracking-[Nem] values are a smell; escalate by adding a token.

rules.name: The Tabular-Numerics Rule
rules.body: Every digit on the sheet uses tabular-nums and font-semibold so columns of values, current/max ratios, and rolled totals align without jitter as content changes.

rules.name: The Five-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Only the five tokens (shadow-card, shadow-card-hover, shadow-sheet, shadow-modal, shadow-launcher) carry elevation. shadow-lg, shadow-xl, ad-hoc literals, neumorphic insets, and any inner shadow are forbidden. If a new surface seems to need a sixth shadow, the surface is probably wrong — push it to a card, a modal, or no shadow at all.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Sections, fields, lists, and the printed sheet itself are flat. Hover lift is reserved for interactive cards (library, selection); state changes elsewhere are colour or border, not depth.

dos: Do treat the printed /character/:id/sheet as the canonical visual spec. If the editor and the printed view diverge, the editor follows the printed sheet — never the other way around.
Do reach for typography (size, weight, tracking, family, italic, case) before colour, border, or icon.
Do use the named tokens for colour, sub-12px sizes, tracking, and shadow (tracking-eyebrow, text-microlabel, shadow-card, etc.). Adding a token is the way to escalate; bypassing the system is not.
Do italicise player-entered content (name, blessings, distinctive features, rewards, virtues, gear, weapon and armour names) and pair the input with placeholder:not-italic.
Do apply tabular-nums and font-semibold to every digit on the sheet so columns of numbers stay aligned as content changes.
Do keep token names stable across themes (--color-ink-red is ink-red in parchment and bronze in tor-dark). Component code never branches on theme.
Do honour prefers-reduced-motion beyond the global safety net — the dice tray disables physics via usePrefersReducedMotion rather than relying on the CSS cap alone.
Do use the Diamond primitive when you need a mark that means 'attribute' or 'the One Sheet brand' — the brand mark, the attribute TN cluster, the theme toggle, the empty-state ornament.
donts: Don't use generic SaaS dashboard chrome — Stripe-style gradients, neon CTAs, glassmorphism, blurred surfaces. They are explicit anti-references in PRODUCT context (AGENTS.md §12).
Don't dress the app in fantasy clichés — dragon-scale borders, faux-medieval drop caps, parchment textures used as wallpaper. The sheet must read as set-in-type, not cosplay.
Don't introduce a cursive face. Hierarchy comes from family, weight, tracking, italic, and case — not from a script.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1 px as a coloured stripe accent on cards, list items, callouts, or alerts. Use the double-stroke frame, the rubric ink-red, or no border at all.
Don't apply gradients to text (background-clip: text + gradient is forbidden) or to broad surfaces. Solid colours and tinted neutrals only.
Don't write ad-hoc shadow-[…], tracking-[Nem], text-[Npx], or hex literals in component code. Escalate by adding a token in src/styles.css, not by bypassing the system.

Don't persist any derived value (Endurance, Parry, Load, Hope, TNs, conditions). Storage holds source fields only; recompute on every read. This is an architecture rule that affects design — derived ratings displayed on cards are computed at render time.
Don't hardcode UI strings. Every label, button, eyebrow, and tooltip routes through t('namespace.key') — even on a single-bundle pt-BR app today.
Don't ship console.* calls except console.error.
Don't drop below the 10 px type floor. If a label needs to fit smaller, the layout is wrong.
Don't use a modal as the first thought. Exhaust inline / progressive alternatives before reaching for Modal.
